install_batches.description: Build the PETSc-centered backend family first so dependent wrappers and eigensolvers inherit one native base.
install_batches.title: Batch 1A: PETSc family

install_batches.description: Build the Trilinos family after PETSc to cover the second major backend lineage.
install_batches.title: Batch 1B: Trilinos family

install_batches.description: Build sparse direct and factorization backends that later solver platforms can reuse.
install_batches.title: Batch 1C: Sparse-direct family

install_batches.description: Build the nonlinear optimization, time integration, and chemistry-kernel family.
install_batches.title: Batch 1D: IPOPT/SUNDIALS/TChem family

install_batches.description: Build low-level geometry-native libraries after the numerical backend families are frozen.
install_batches.title: Batch 1E: Geometry native family

install_batches.description: Build the Intel oneMKL-backed sparse and nonlinear backend container path after the open NLP family is frozen.
install_batches.title: Batch 1F: Intel oneMKL family

install_batches.description: Install the first-wave seed stack and coupling-adjacent platforms.
install_batches.title: Batch 2A: Core solver/platform first wave

install_batches.description: Install the second-wave platforms after the first-wave solver path is stable.
install_batches.title: Batch 2B: Core solver/platform second wave

install_batches.description: Install PETSc-bound wrappers only after the PETSc family is green.
install_batches.title: Batch 3A: PETSc companion wrappers

install_batches.description: Install wrappers that depend on the chosen nonlinear optimization backend family.
install_batches.title: Batch 3B: NLP companion wrappers

install_batches.description: Install coupling wrappers once their paired solver platforms are verified.
install_batches.title: Batch 3C: Coupling wrappers

install_batches.description: Install OpenModelica-bound wrappers after the Modelica host runtime is verified.
install_batches.title: Batch 3D: Modelica wrappers

install_batches.description: Install FMU wrappers after the chosen FMU host path is frozen.
install_batches.title: Batch 3E: FMU wrappers

install_batches.description: Install SALOME-bound translators after the SALOME platform is verified.
install_batches.title: Batch 3F: SALOME companions

install_batches.description: Install visualization companions after the visualization host stack is verified.
install_batches.title: Batch 3G: Visualization companions

install_batches.description: Install Rhino-bound scripting and API companions after the local Rhino host runtime is verified.
install_batches.title: Batch 3H: Rhino host companions

install_batches.description: Install OpenMDAO-adjacent Python frameworks in one shared uv environment.
install_batches.title: Batch 4A: OpenMDAO-adjacent Python frameworks

install_batches.description: Install process and system-model frameworks in one shared uv environment.
install_batches.title: Batch 4B: Process/system Python frameworks

install_batches.description: Install domain and inverse-physics frameworks in one shared uv environment.
install_batches.title: Batch 4C: Inverse-physics/domain Python frameworks

install_batches.description: Install distributed and ML-oriented reserve frameworks in one shared uv environment.
install_batches.title: Batch 4D: Distributed/ML/reserve Python frameworks

install_batches.description: Build knowledge-only validators, mappings, and examples for standards and exchange formats.
install_batches.title: Batch 5: Standards

install_batches.description: Do not install in this sprint; prepare acquisition dossiers for the next sprint.
install_batches.title: Batch 6: Deferred external/manual

install_method_categories.description: Containerized native solver and platform applications with executable runtime surfaces.
install_method_categories.title: I1 containerized_native_solver_platform

install_method_categories.description: Containerized native backend families and kernel libraries that should be built once and reused by dependents.
install_method_categories.title: I2 containerized_native_backend_family

install_method_categories.description: Python-first packages installed into shared uv environments by compatible family.
install_method_categories.title: I3 python_first_venv_package

install_method_categories.description: Host-bound wrappers and companions that inherit their installation path from a verified parent runtime.
install_method_categories.title: I4 host_companion_wrapper

install_method_categories.description: Standards and exchange formats modeled as knowledge artifacts with validators and mappings, not installs.
install_method_categories.title: I5 knowledge_only_standard

install_method_categories.description: Modules blocked on user-supplied source, licenses, proprietary runtimes, or interactive/manual acquisition.
install_method_categories.title: I6 deferred_external_manual

kb_build_batches.description: Build executable solver platform packs with runtime-linked recipes, adapters, and evidence.
kb_build_batches.title: Phase 2 K1: Solver/platform packs

kb_build_batches.description: Build one family pack per backend lineage, then add child overlays.
kb_build_batches.title: Phase 2 K2: Backend family packs

kb_build_batches.description: Build API-centric Python framework packs with import probes, recipes, and failure signatures.
kb_build_batches.title: Phase 2 K3: Python framework packs

kb_build_batches.description: Build companion packs tied to verified parent runtimes and compatibility evidence.
kb_build_batches.title: Phase 2 K4: Host companion packs

kb_build_batches.description: Build knowledge-only standard packs with validators, schema maps, and host mappings.
kb_build_batches.title: Phase 2 K5: Standard/spec packs

kb_build_batches.description: Build placeholder packs for externally acquired modules after acquisition prerequisites are met.
kb_build_batches.title: Phase 2 K6: Deferred acquisition packs

kb_build_method_categories.description: Executable application and solver platform packs with runtime-linked recipes, adapters, and evidence.
kb_build_method_categories.title: K1 executable_solver_platform_pack

kb_build_method_categories.description: Backend family packs with shared runtime evidence and child overlays for tightly related kernels.
kb_build_method_categories.title: K2 backend_family_pack

kb_build_method_categories.description: API-centric Python package packs with import probes, minimal recipes, and framework-specific failure signatures.
kb_build_method_categories.title: K3 python_framework_pack

kb_build_method_categories.description: Companion packs that must link to a verified parent runtime and compatibility evidence.
kb_build_method_categories.title: K4 companion_host_bound_pack

kb_build_method_categories.description: Knowledge-only standard packs with validators, schema maps, examples, and host/runtime mappings.
kb_build_method_categories.title: K5 standard_spec_pack

kb_build_method_categories.description: Placeholder packs for externally acquired modules, recording capability, constraints, and acquisition prerequisites.
kb_build_method_categories.title: K6 acquisition_deferred_pack
